sourceLabel: Town of Salisbury 2025 General Operating Budget (Council approval announcement)
dataStatusNote: Total ($7.88M) is confirmed from the Town's December 2024 council announcement; the bucket breakdown is a proportional estimate typical of small NB villages (heavy RCMP contract share, no own police, no transit). The Town did not publish a department-level breakdown in the public announcement. Wastewater is a separate $496K utility fund.

nativeDepartments.name: RCMP contract + Salisbury Fire Rescue + bylaw (estimated)
Wastewater run as a separate $496K utility fund (paid on the user's bill)
Recreation, parks, events, Highland Park, community programming (estimated)
Planning, development incentives — $150K Residential Development Incentive Program confirmed; rest estimated
Debt servicing (incl. Fire Rescue Station financing) + ~$650K Capital Budget contribution (estimated)
